mapper.select: select ifnull(ct.totalAmount, 0) as totalAmount, ifnull(ct.totalTonnage, 0) as totalTonnage, ifnull(dv.deliveredAmount, 0) as deliveredAmount, ifnull(dv.deliveredTonnage, 0) as deliveredTonnage, ifnull(ct.totalAmount, 0) - ifnull(dv.deliveredAmount, 0) as remainAmount, ifnull(ct.totalTonnage, 0) - ifnull(dv.deliveredTonnage, 0) as remainTonnage from (select 1 as dummy) t left join ( select SUM(amount) as totalAmount, SUM(tonnage) as totalTonnage from jsh_contract where organ_id = #{organId} and ifnull(delete_flag,'0') != '1' ) ct on 1=1 left join ( select SUM(ifnull(dh.total_price,0)+ifnull(dh.other_money,0)-ifnull(dh.deposit,0)) as deliveredAmount, SUM(ifnull(di_sum.w,0)) as deliveredTonnage from jsh_depot_head dh left join ( select header_id, SUM(ifnull(weight,0)) as w from jsh_depot_item where ifnull(delete_flag,'0')!='1' group by header_id ) di_sum on di_sum.header_id = dh.id where dh.organ_id = #{organId} and dh.type='出库' and dh.sub_type='销售' and ifnull(dh.delete_flag,'0')!='1' ) dv on 1=1
